name: se-review-skills-shared-reference-snapshots
title: Expand skill review across user installs and repository sources
description: Extend se-review-skills to discover bounded user-installed skill roots, map every installed copy to verified canonical repository sources, prefer the local repository even when installed content drifts, deduplicate copies and findings across install surfaces, include shared resources in snapshot identity, and end reports with actionable next steps.
creator: sdelmas
